examples: I am now being termed a "rapid cycler".
He was a much stronger cycler than I was from the start so he would lose me on the hills.
The Aldrin Cycler can takes vehicles from Earth to Mars and back, albeit slowly, which is perfect for long-haul freight.
The law was amended again to equalize rates except for continuous cycler-assisted peritoneal dialysis, a method performed on patients at home while they sleep.
